generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about smart resilience. While some claim we're turning our backs on allies, the truth is we're ensuring no single disruption can cripple our security. Look at Germany's energy crisis: over-reliance on one source left them vulnerable. Diversification isn't weakness - it's the only way to guarantee stability in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #SmartAutonomy
